features.description: Add a document from title + body; persist it to disk.
features.acceptance: POST /api/documents {title,body} returns 201 with {id,title,body} and writes data/documents/<id>.json.
features.evidence: POST {title:'Prompt Caching'} -> 201 {id:'prompt-caching',...}; file prompt-caching.json on disk.

features.acceptance: GET /api/documents/:id returns the full {id,title,body}, or 404 if missing.
An imported document is still listed by /api/documents after the server restarts.
features.evidence: Imported prompt-caching, restarted, GET /api/documents still lists it.
